segments.text: I wonder if things would've gone completely different if that had connected
segments.original_text: どこでも食えれば試合内容が変わっているのかな

segments.text: If we look at how Kuroshio took that KO race on the first stock
segments.original_text: 1ストック目の撃墜レースで黒船が成功した形を捉えれば

full_text: I wonder if things would've gone completely different if that had connected If we look at how Kuroshio took that KO race on the first stock Yeah, that's basically it Whoa! Whoa!

corrections.rule: player name: 黒船 (くろふね)
